title: HarmPrevention
description: Non-punitive, trauma-preventive safeguards governing all system actions.

policy_id.description: Unique identifier for this harm-prevention policy object.

timestamp.description: Time the harm-prevention evaluation was generated.

source_context.description: Context from the originating engine or action.

engine.description: Which subsystem triggered the harm-prevention evaluation.

reference_id.description: ID of the originating object (action, forecast, identity, etc.).

harm_risk.description: Evaluation of potential harm across emotional, physical
